case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-60s emailservice metrics/traces. Latency.p50/p90 dev=+1.8, trace latency.p99 dev=+0.4 confirm emailservice latency as root cause. Workload dev=+0.6 supports sustained issue. Rankings updated to prioritize emailservice_latency.
